_note: Bracket wiring: which prior-round winners feed each knockout slot, by SLOT id (not team names). 'slots' maps a match id to the two feeder match ids whose winners meet there. 'third_place' is fed by the two beaten semi-finalists. This uses a clean sequential pairing (R32-1 & R32-2 -> R16-1, ...); confirm the actual R32->R16 adjacency against the official FIFA 2026 bracket before relying on it for the connected tree view.
